name: sealed courier satchel
description: sealed courier satchel for beginner Smart MUD play.

name: old gate shard
description: old gate shard for beginner Smart MUD play.
short_description: A broken shard from the Old Gate
look_description: A dark splinter of old gate metal, cold despite the air.
examine_description: Its fractured edge glints with stress marks from a powerful impact.

name: rat tail
description: rat tail for beginner Smart MUD play.
look_description: A wiry rat tail, proof of a cellar kill.
examine_description: The tail is stiff and unpleasant, but recognizable enough for a bounty.

name: suspicious ledger
description: suspicious ledger for beginner Smart MUD play.

name: Guild Token
description: guild token for beginner Smart MUD play.
room_description: A small guild token lies here.
look_description: A palm-sized brass token stamped with the Adventurers Guild crest.
examine_description: The crest is worn smooth at the edges from many anxious thumbs.
identify_description: A mundane guild credential used for starter training records.

name: Old Gate
description: old gate for beginner Smart MUD play.
room_description: The Old Gate looms over the road.
look_description: An old iron-bound gate stands watch over the road beyond the square.
examine_description: Rust freckles the hinges, but the stone posts remain solid. Scratches around the latch show years of hurried passage.

name: Fountain
description: fountain for beginner Smart MUD play.
room_description: A weathered stone fountain burbles in the square.
look_description:
A weathered stone fountain stands in the center of the square. Clear water spills from its carved basin.

The water appears clean.
examine_description: Age has softened the carved figures around the basin. The water is clear, and no foul odor rises from it.

default_interactions.drink: You drink cool, clean water from the fountain.

name: Notice Board
description: notice board for beginner Smart MUD play.
room_description: A notice board is crowded with curling scraps of parchment.
look_description: A public notice board stands near the square, pinned with guild notices and local warnings.
examine_description: Several notices are weather-stained, but the newest sheet bears the guild seal.
readable_text: Posted notices: New adventurers should report to the training yard and carry clean water before leaving town.
